jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, APM Trace Pipeline
jobs.content:
About the role

Own the Datadog APM trace ingestion pipeline that processes tens of millions of traces per second across the global observability fleet's distributed analysis layer.

  • Go, distributed-systems, and high-throughput streaming experience required

jobs.title: Senior Manager, Customer Success — Cloud SIEM
jobs.content: Own Datadog's customer-success strategy roadmap across enterprise-account adoption of Cloud SIEM, Cloud Security Management, and the Bits AI security-investigation motion.
